G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
a head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : tail✝ = replicate tail✝.length a ↔ ∀ (b : α), b ∈ tail✝ → b = a
⊢ head✝ :: tail✝ = replicate (head✝ :: tail✝).length a ↔ ∀ (b : α), b ∈ head✝ :: tail✝ → b = a

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
a head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : tail = replicate tail.length a ↔ ∀ (b : α), b ∈ tail → b = a
⊢ head :: tail = replicate (head :: tail).length a ↔ ∀ (b : α), b ∈ head :: tail → b = a
